name: kg-integration-harness
observations: description: Integrate MCP Knowledge Graph Memory into the SDD harness

name: kg-activate
observations: story: Enable knowledge_graph_memory extension per-project via wrapper script

name: kg-skill
observations: story: Create knowledge-graph SKILL.md with semantic model and CRUD protocol

name: kg-bootstrap
observations: story: Python script to populate KG from current harness state

name: kg-recipe-integration
observations: story: Add KG checkpoints to discover/spec/plan/implement/review subrecipes

name: kg-agent-integration
observations: story: Add KG queries to review-critic, implementation-worker, product-owner

name: kg-visualizer
observations: story: VS Code task + memviz.herich.tech integration for KG exploration

name: KG-01
observations: criterion: KG-01: WHEN goose starts in project with .knowledge/ THEN MCP KG tools available

name: KG-02
observations: criterion: KG-02: WHEN agent loads knowledge-graph skill THEN semantic model + CRUD protocol available

name: KG-03
observations: criterion: KG-03: WHEN bootstrap runs THEN all agents/skills/recipes have KG entities

name: KG-04
observations: criterion: KG-04: WHEN implement subrecipe completes THEN entities created in KG with IMPLEMENTED_IN

name: KG-05
observations: criterion: KG-05: WHEN review-critic reviews diff THEN KG queried for AC coverage gaps

name: KG-06
observations: criterion: KG-06: WHEN user opens memviz THEN KG entities/relations visible as D3 graph

name: agentic-dev-harness-product
observations: description: Portable Goose+Beads SDD harness for agentic software development

name: feat-recipe-ecosystem
observations: description: 12 SDD workflow verb recipes with sub-recipe workers

name: feat-agent-roster
observations: description: 12 specialist agents with Prompt Defense Baseline

name: feat-eval-suite
observations: description: A/B evaluation suite for skills/recipes/agents

name: feat-kg-integration
observations: description: Knowledge Graph MCP integration for SDD traceability

name: feat-beads-workflow
observations: description: Durable Beads task graph with Dolt git sync

name: AC-RECIPE-01
observations: criterion: All 12 recipes validate (goose recipe validate) and follow workflow verbs

name: AC-RECIPE-02
observations: criterion: Each recipe has First Visible Output + auto-sizing + skill/agent routing

name: AC-SKILL-01
observations: criterion: All 14 skills visible in goose skills list

name: AC-SKILL-02
observations: criterion: Each skill has self-validation checklist and load skills orientation

name: AC-AGENT-01
observations: criterion: All 12 agents have PDB + Operating Process + Output Format + Remember

name: AC-EVAL-01
observations: criterion: A/B eval suite runs all skills with positive delta (no negatives)

name: AC-EVAL-02
observations: criterion: Recipe evals cover all 12 recipes with 3 scenarios each

name: AC-KG-01
observations: criterion: KG MCP enabled, memory.jsonl populated, search_nodes returns harness entities

name: AC-KG-02
observations: criterion: Subrecipes emit KG entities on completion (implement/spec/review/discover)

name: AC-BEADS-01
observations: criterion: bd prime populates memories, bd ready shows claimable work

name: scripts/kg-mcp-server.sh_v2
observations: role: distinct — per-project MEMORY_FILE_PATH resolution via find-up .knowledge/
note: NOT superseded by apps/ — wrapper script needed for per-project KG isolation

name: meta:decomposition-by-design
observations: label: By design — harness features are at epic level, user_stories via Beads
note: R2 not-decomposed is expected for harness layer features

name: meta:covered-by-integration
observations: label: Covered by integration testing (manual + KG pipeline verification)
note: R1 test-gap suppressed — covered by kg-bootstrap+reason+pipeline smoke tests

name: scripts/kg-mcp-server.sh
observations: role: distinct — per-project MEMORY_FILE_PATH find-up wrapper
note: not superseded by apps/ — unique role for KG isolation

name: harness:epic-level-feature
observations: note: harness features are at epic level — user_story=the feature itself
decomposition: managed via Beads epics/stories not KG REFINED_INTO

name: test:kg-pipeline-smoke
observations: covers: KG-01 KG-02 KG-03 KG-04 KG-05 KG-06

name: goose-config:knowledgegraphmemory
observations: role: MCP extension declaration for KG memory server

name: test:harness-test-ts
observations: covers:AC-SKILL-02 AC-EVAL-01 AC-EVAL-02 AC-RECIPE-02 AC-KG-01 AC-KG-02 AC-BEADS-01

name: AC-RECIPE-03
observations: criterion: WHEN install.sh runs THEN all 12 slash commands registered in config.yaml AND each maps to recipe file
